description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a double cutaway design, finished in a deep, glossy cherry red color. The body features a black pickguard, two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and a three-way toggle switch. The neck is set-in and made of a darker wood, with trapezoid inlays on the fretboard and 22 frets. The headstock is angled and fitted with three tuning pegs on each side, and the back of the guitar shows a smooth, uninterrupted wood grain. The hardware, including the bridge and tuners, appears to be chrome or nickel-plated. The overall design is reminiscent of classic rock guitars, suitable for performance in urban music venues or street performances.
description: A glossy cherry red, double cutaway electric guitar with black pickguard, dual humbuckers, and chrome hardware. Features a set neck with trapezoid inlays and a classic angled headstock.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cherry red body, black pickguard, two humbucker pickups, four control knobs, and trapezoid inlays on the fretboard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim body profile, set neck joint, and the slight arch of the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, uninterrupted wood grain of the back and neck, with the back plate visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the thinness of the body and the protruding hardware components.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three tuning pegs per side, no visible logo, classic Gibson-style contour
